questions.template: A car accelerates from rest at {a} m/s² for {t} seconds. What is its final velocity?
An object starts at {v0} m/s and decelerates at {a} m/s². How far does it travel before stopping?
A ball is dropped from rest. After {t} seconds, what is its velocity? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
A car traveling at {v0} m/s accelerates at {a} m/s² for {t} seconds. What is the distance traveled?
